title: Project Update: Authentication Flow
content: Successfully implemented JWT-based authentication middleware and integrated the signup/login controllers using Node.js and Express.

title: Frontend Setup with Tailwind CSS
content: Initialized the React frontend application using Vite, configured Tailwind CSS, and successfully built the structural components for the Register and Login pages.

title: Database Schema Optimization
content: Designed and verified Mongoose schemas for User, Video, and Subscription collections, establishing robust relations for full-stack data integrity.

title: Cloudinary Media Integration
content: Configured the backend system to handle multi-part form data uploads for profile pictures and cover photos, securely sending them directly to Cloudinary storage.

title: Interview Preparation Plan
content: Drafted a targeted 4-month preparation strategy focusing heavily on advanced JavaScript concepts, data structures, algorithms, and full-stack system architectures.
